raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/year>, I purchased a Done-For-You Premium Package from XXXX, XXXX, paying {$12000.00} total for marketing and sales services. I charged {$2000.00} of this payment to my Best Buy Citibank credit card. 

The contract stated that services would continue until 10 clients were closed for my business. However, the merchant removed a critical component of the service ( a trained sales closer ) months before any clients were closed and failed to deliver many contractually required services. 

I initially filed a dispute with Citibank regarding the {$2000.00} charge, but the claim was denied based on timeliness, not the merits of my evidence. After the denial, I submitted a formal rebuttal letter via fax, providing : -The signed contract showing unfulfilled services -XXXX  communications demonstrating repeated service failures -A timeline of events -XXXX  reviews showing similar complaints from other customers -A clear explanation of why the denial should be reconsidered Despite my rebuttal on XX/XX/year>, Citibank has failed to respond at all. that they would not reopen the dispute. The case remains unresolved in my account, and I am still being held responsible for paying {$2000.00} for services the merchant did not deliver and a guarantee they did not honor. I believe this charge should not stand because the merchant failed to fulfill its contractual obligations and Citibank has not conducted a fair review of the evidence.
